_readme: pipeline v7 — whisper 실측+간격배분+감쇠보정, QA 통과분
title: I beg your pardon

sentences.en: He told me once he was an Oxford man. However, I don't believe it.
sentences.ko: 옥스퍼드 출신이라고 한 적이 있어요. 근데 난 안 믿어요.

sentences.en: I don't know. I just don't believe he went there.
sentences.ko: 글쎄요. 그냥 거길 다녔을 것 같지가 않아요.

sentences.en: Miss Baker, Mr. Gatsby would like to speak to you. Alone.
sentences.ko: 베이커 양, 개츠비 씨께서 얘기를 나누고 싶어 하십니다. 단둘이서요.
